title: Cameco Inks $1.9B Long-Term Uranium Supply Deal With India
raw_text: Cameco Corporation (NYSE: CCJ) announced a $1.9 billion uranium supply agreement with India, strengthening its global commercial footprint in nuclear fuel markets. The deal positions Cameco as a leading supplier to emerging Asian nuclear programs.
rationale: About Cameco (CCJ), not Energy Fuels. Same sector but different ticker.
